title: Workforms - integrating a connected board for dropdown selections
excerpt: I’m building a workform for internal use for staff to raise work requests on behalf of clients. The form requires a dropdown selector that pulls from a list of clients in another connected board. How do I get the connect…

posts.author: Boiker (Brendon)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m building a workform for internal use for staff to raise work requests on behalf of clients. The form requires a dropdown selector that pulls from a list of clients in another connected board. How do I get the connected board results to appear in a dropdown list as part of filling in the form?

posts.author: jailynnlucidday (Jai-Lynn Hoops)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Boiker !

Welcome to the community! While Monday.com Workforms do not support connect board columns at the moment, SuperForms does! It’s an integration in at App store within monday.com.

Hope this helps!

posts.author: Nir-Jetpack (Nir @ Jetpack Team)
posts.cookedHtml: @Boiker VLOOKUP (a paid app) can help you with that. Many of VLOOKUP customers use it as an alternative to connect boards in forms. Let me know if you have any questions or need some trial period to experiment.

posts.author: jpelrman87 (Josh Perlman)
posts.cookedHtml: How would this work to use vlookup integrated with a dropdown of items from another board?
